task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

allow signup and login
owner is 'demo@example.com'

# CUSTOMERS ENDPOINTS
when user sends customer to /api/customers:
  requires login
  validate customer:
    name is text, required
    company is text, required
  saved = save customer as new Customer
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  send back all Customers

when user updates customer at /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  save customer to Customers
  send back 'updated'

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  delete the Customer with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# ONBOARDING STEPS ENDPOINTS
when user sends step to /api/steps:
  requires login
  validate step:
    customer_id is number, required
    step_name is text, required
  saved = save step as new OnboardingStep
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps
  send back steps

when user calls GET /api/steps/:id:
  send back all OnboardingSteps

when user updates step at /api/steps/:id:
  requires login
  save step to OnboardingSteps
  send back 'updated'

when user calls DELETE /api/steps/:id:
  requires login
  delete the OnboardingStep with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# FILTER ENDPOINT - must come before generic /:id endpoint
when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back onboarding

# FRONTEND PAGE
page 'App' at '/':
  requires login
  customers = []
  steps = []
  customer_name = ''
  customer_company = ''
  step_name = ''
  step_customer_id = 0

  on page load get customers from '/api/customers'
  on page load get steps from '/api/steps'

  section 'Add Customer':
    'Customer Name' is a text input saved as customer_name
    'Company' is a text input saved as customer_company
    button 'Save Customer':
      send customer_name, customer_company to '/api/customers'
      set customer_name to ''
      set customer_company to ''
      get customers from '/api/customers'

  section 'Add Onboarding Step':
    'Step Name' is a text input saved as step_name
    'Customer ID' is a number input saved as step_customer_id
    button 'Save Step':
      send step_customer_id, step_name to '/api/steps'
      set step_name to ''
      set step_customer_id to 0
      get steps from '/api/steps'

  section 'Customers':
    display customers as table

  section 'Onboarding Steps':
    display steps as table
